requirement_topic.en: ENEE / CREE Grid Connection for BESS — 60 Hz System, IEC 62933, and Project-Specific Interconnection Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: ENEE / CREE BESS并网——60 Hz系统、IEC 62933及项目专属并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: ENEE / CREE BESS併網——60 Hz系統、IEC 62933及項目專屬併網要求

summary.en: Honduras's electricity sector is regulated by CREE (Comisión Reguladora de Energía Eléctrica) under Ley Marco del Sub-Sector Eléctrico (Decree No. 158-94 and subsequent amendments). ENEE (Empresa Nacional de Energía Eléctrica) is the vertically integrated national utility and transmission system operator responsible for grid operations, dispatch, and interconnection approvals, operating under ODS (Operador del Sistema, Despacho y Mercado) functions. All grid-connected BESS installations — including utility-scale, C&I, and behind-the-meter projects — require CREE regulatory authorisation and ENEE interconnection technical approval. Honduras's grid operates at 60 Hz. Distribution voltage levels are 120/240 V single-phase (split-phase, residential and small commercial) and 120/208 V or 277/480 V three-phase (commercial and industrial). BESS power conversion systems (PCS) — bidirectional inverters — must be designed, configured, firmware-validated, and protection-parameter-set for Honduras's 60 Hz grid before interconnection testing and commissioning. SIEPAC (Sistema de Interconexión Eléctrica de los Países de América Central) regional interconnection means Honduras's grid is linked to the Central American regional electricity market (MER); regional grid-stability and interconnection standards may apply to utility-scale BESS projects. No publicly accessible ENEE or CREE technical specification document specifically and comprehensively addressing BESS grid connection had been confirmed from official sources as of the dataset date; project-specific interconnection agreement terms must be obtained directly from ENEE and CREE.
summary.zh: 洪都拉斯电力行业由CREE（电力监管委员会）依据《电力子行业框架法》（第158-94号法令及后续修订）进行监管。ENEE（国家电力公司）是垂直一体化的国家电力公司和输电系统运营商，负责电网运营、调度及并网审批，行使ODS（系统、调度和市场运营商）职能。所有并网BESS装置——包括公用事业规模、工商业及表后项目——均须取得CREE监管授权和ENEE并网技术批准。洪都拉斯电网频率为60 Hz。配电电压为单相120/240 V（分相，住宅和小型商业）及三相120/208 V或277/480 V（商业和工业）。BESS储能变流器（PCS）——双向逆变器——须在并网测试和调试前针对洪都拉斯60 Hz电网完成设计、配置、固件验证和保护参数设置。SIEPAC（中美洲国家电力互联系统）区域互联意味着洪都拉斯电网与中美洲区域电力市场（MER）相连；区域电网稳定性及并网标准可能适用于公用事业规模BESS项目。截至本数据集日期，尚未从官方来源确认ENEE或CREE公开发布专门全面涉及BESS并网的技术规格文件；项目专属并网协议条款须直接向ENEE和CREE获取。
summary.zht: 宏都拉斯電力行業由CREE（電力監管委員會）依據《電力子行業框架法》（第158-94號法令及後續修訂）進行監管。ENEE（國家電力公司）是垂直一體化的國家電力公司和輸電系統運營商，負責電網運營、調度及併網審批，行使ODS（系統、調度和市場運營商）職能。所有併網BESS裝置——包括公用事業規模、工商業及表後項目——均須取得CREE監管授權和ENEE併網技術批准。宏都拉斯電網頻率為60 Hz。配電電壓為單相120/240 V（分相，住宅和小型商業）及三相120/208 V或277/480 V（商業和工業）。BESS儲能變流器（PCS）——雙向逆變器——須在併網測試和調試前針對宏都拉斯60 Hz電網完成設計、配置、韌體驗證和保護參數設置。SIEPAC（中美洲國家電力互聯系統）區域互聯意味著宏都拉斯電網與中美洲區域電力市場（MER）相連；區域電網穩定性及併網標準可能適用於公用事業規模BESS項目。截至本數據集日期，尚未從官方來源確認ENEE或CREE公開發布專門全面涉及BESS併網的技術規格文件；項目專屬併網協議條款須直接向ENEE和CREE獲取。

standards_or_laws: Ley Marco del Sub-Sector Eléctrico — Decree No. 158-94 (Honduras) and subsequent amendments — primary legal framework for electricity sector regulation
CREE (Comisión Reguladora de Energía Eléctrica) — regulatory authority; renewable energy project authorisation and grid-connection approvals
ENEE (Empresa Nacional de Energía Eléctrica) — national utility and transmission system operator; BESS interconnection technical approval
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
SIEPAC — Sistema de Interconexión Eléctrica de los Países de América Central — regional interconnection framework; regional grid-stability requirements may apply to utility-scale BESS

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase). This is fundamentally incompatible with Honduras's 60 Hz grid at 120/240 V single-phase and 120/208 V or 277/480 V three-phase. PCS firmware, protection relay settings, frequency ride-through parameters, anti-islanding thresholds, and voltage regulation settings configured for China's 50 Hz / 220–380 V grid must all be reconfigured, revalidated, and retested for Honduras's 60 Hz / 120–240 V grid before interconnection testing and commissioning. This is not a minor adjustment — it involves fundamental inverter operating parameter changes.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2023（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）。这与洪都拉斯单相120/240 V和三相120/208 V或277/480 V的60 Hz电网存在根本性不兼容。针对中国50 Hz / 220–380 V电网配置的PCS固件、保护继电器设置、频率穿越参数、防孤岛阈值及电压调节设置，均须在并网测试和调试前针对洪都拉斯60 Hz / 120–240 V电网条件重新配置、重新验证和重新测试。这并非微小调整——涉及逆变器基本运行参数的根本性变更。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2023（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）。這與宏都拉斯單相120/240 V和三相120/208 V或277/480 V的60 Hz電網存在根本性不相容。針對中國50 Hz / 220–380 V電網配置的PCS韌體、保護繼電器設置、頻率穿越參數、防孤島閾值及電壓調節設置，均須在併網測試和調試前針對宏都拉斯60 Hz / 120–240 V電網條件重新配置、重新驗證和重新測試。這並非微小調整——涉及逆變器基本運行參數的根本性變更。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy ENEE or CREE grid-connection requirements in Honduras. The most critical gap is the fundamental grid parameter incompatibility: (a) frequency — Honduras is 60 Hz, China is 50 Hz; Chinese PCS units must be reconfigured for 60 Hz operation including frequency ride-through, anti-islanding protection (consistent with IEEE 1547 or applicable standard as referenced by CREE/ENEE), and BMS communication timing — this is not a firmware patch but a validated hardware and software reconfiguration; (b) voltage — Honduras distribution is 120/240 V single-phase or 120/208 V / 277/480 V three-phase, not China's 220/380 V; transformer selection, PCS output stage design, and protection thresholds must match Honduras levels; (c) CREE and ENEE project-specific interconnection agreement terms must be obtained directly from the regulators before equipment procurement is finalised — no publicly accessible comprehensive BESS interconnection technical specification has been confirmed; (d) IEC 62933 series compliance — where project specifications or international project finance requires IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence, prepare test and design documentation accordingly; Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (e) SIEPAC / MER regional grid requirements — confirm with ENEE whether utility-scale BESS projects must satisfy additional regional frequency and stability requirements under the Central American interconnected grid framework.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足洪都拉斯ENEE或CREE并网要求。最关键差距是基本电网参数不兼容：（a）频率——洪都拉斯为60 Hz，中国为50 Hz；中国PCS设备须重新配置为60 Hz运行，包括频率穿越、防孤岛保护（符合CREE/ENEE引用的IEEE 1547或适用标准）及BMS通信时序——这不是固件补丁，而是经过验证的硬件和软件重新配置；（b）电压——洪都拉斯配电为单相120/240 V或三相120/208 V / 277/480 V，而非中国的220/380 V；变压器选型、PCS输出级设计及保护阈值必须与洪都拉斯电压等级匹配；（c）CREE和ENEE项目专属并网协议条款须在设备采购最终确定前直接向监管机构获取——尚未确认公开发布的全面BESS并网技术规格；（d）IEC 62933系列合规——若项目规格或国际项目融资要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2证据，须相应准备测试和设计文件；中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（e）SIEPAC / MER区域电网要求——向ENEE确认公用事业规模BESS项目是否须在中美洲互联电网框架下满足额外区域频率和稳定性要求。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足宏都拉斯ENEE或CREE併網要求。最關鍵差距是基本電網參數不相容：（a）頻率——宏都拉斯為60 Hz，中國為50 Hz；中國PCS設備須重新配置為60 Hz運行，包括頻率穿越、防孤島保護（符合CREE/ENEE引用的IEEE 1547或適用標準）及BMS通訊時序——這不是韌體補丁，而是經過驗證的硬體和軟體重新配置；（b）電壓——宏都拉斯配電為單相120/240 V或三相120/208 V / 277/480 V，而非中國的220/380 V；變壓器選型、PCS輸出級設計及保護閾值必須與宏都拉斯電壓等級匹配；（c）CREE和ENEE項目專屬併網協議條款須在設備採購最終確定前直接向監管機構獲取——尚未確認公開發布的全面BESS併網技術規格；（d）IEC 62933系列合規——若項目規格或國際項目融資要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2證據，須相應準備測試和設計文件；中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（e）SIEPAC / MER區域電網要求——向ENEE確認公用事業規模BESS項目是否須在中美洲互聯電網框架下滿足額外區域頻率和穩定性要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CREE regulatory authorisation and ENEE interconnection approval are required for all grid-connected BESS in Honduras; technical requirements are project-specific and defined in interconnection agreements with ENEE
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558-2023 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; 50 Hz / 220–380 V parameters are not transferable to Honduras's 60 Hz / 120–240 V grid

source.publisher: CREE — Comisión Reguladora de Energía Eléctrica (Honduras)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy Honduras CREE and ENEE grid-connection requirements. The fundamental barrier is the 60 Hz / 120–240 V grid versus China's 50 Hz / 220–380 V grid: BESS PCS must be redesigned, firmware-reconfigured, and revalidated for 60 Hz operation and Honduras voltage levels before interconnection testing. This is not a documentation gap alone — it requires engineering validation. Engage CREE and ENEE at the earliest project stage to obtain interconnection technical requirements, applicable IEC 62933 evidence expectations, and SIEPAC regional grid obligations. No publicly accessible comprehensive ENEE or CREE technical specification specifically for BESS grid connection has been confirmed as of the dataset date — direct regulator engagement is essential.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足洪都拉斯CREE和ENEE并网要求。根本性障碍是60 Hz / 120–240 V电网与中国50 Hz / 220–380 V电网之间的差异：BESS储能变流器须在并网测试前完成针对60 Hz运行和洪都拉斯电压等级的重新设计、固件重新配置和重新验证。这不仅是文件差距——还需要工程验证。应在项目最早阶段与CREE和ENEE接触，获取并网技术要求、适用IEC 62933证据预期及SIEPAC区域电网义务。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认ENEE或CREE公开发布专门针对BESS并网的全面技术规格——与监管机构直接接触至关重要。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足宏都拉斯CREE和ENEE併網要求。根本性障礙是60 Hz / 120–240 V電網與中國50 Hz / 220–380 V電網之間的差異：BESS儲能變流器須在併網測試前完成針對60 Hz運行和宏都拉斯電壓等級的重新設計、韌體重新配置和重新驗證。這不僅是文件差距——還需要工程驗證。應在項目最早階段與CREE和ENEE接觸，獲取併網技術要求、適用IEC 62933證據預期及SIEPAC區域電網義務。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認ENEE或CREE公開發布專門針對BESS併網的全面技術規格——與監管機構直接接觸至關重要。
